title: RAPIDprep: A simple, fast protocol for RNA metagenomic sequencing of clinical samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1fcqa","text":"The updated protocol allows rapid RNA metagenome sequencing of pathogens of clinical respiratory samples. The protocol has been designed to be simple and quick to enable the utilization of existing sample extracts and data back within 24h from start to finish (i.e. library prep - sequencing - analysis). The method also uses commonly available reagents that pairs with amplicon based WGS assays, and works by essentially making rRNA depleted ds-cDNA and library amplification with enzyme based tagmentation using   .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":514,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"djt8o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"742l4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4oc09","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":182832,"guid":"41AA80A8341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Nextera XT DNA Library Preparation Kit","mol_weight":0,"sku":"FC-131-1096","url":"https://www.illumina.com/products/by-type/sequencing-kits/library-prep-kits/nextera-xt-dna.html","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":535,"name":"Illumina, Inc.","link":"https://www.illumina.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}

steps: Extract RNA with Quick-RNA Viral Kit Zymo Research Catalog #R1034 , following manufacturer's instructions. This protocol can be used to sequence pathogens of clinical respiratory samples, including nose and/or throat swab, nasal discharge or aspirates. For samples collected for the purpose of next generation sequencing (NGS), the Quick-RNA Viral Kit Zymo Research Catalog #R1034 is used to rapidly isolate high quality viral RNA from the source sample. However we have also demonstrated the usefulness of this method using the residual viral extracts from clinical samples following diagnostic RT-PCRs, which include extracts off both Qiagen BioRobot EZ1 and Roche MagnaPure 96 platforms. Noting that the first step removes genomic DNA (gDNA), so total nucleic acid or purified RNA can be used. Please ensure appropriate PPE is used at all times and relevant containment protocols are followed to avoid unnecessary exposure to potentially infectious samples.
Mix well by gently pipetting up and down, and briefly centrifuge.

The protocol follows the Nextera XT DNA Library Preparation Kit Illumina, Inc. Catalog #FC-131-1096 except for seven changes: i) neat ds-cDNA from previous reaction is used for template, ii) optimised tagment incubation time is used in tagmentation DNA step, iii) IDT® for Illumina Nextera DNA Unique Dual Indexes (Illumina, USA) are used for libraries amplification indexes, iv) optimised cycles are used in libraries amplification step, v) Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01 is used for libraries clean up, vi) libraries are manually normalised rather than with the provided normalisation beads, and vii) reduce reagent volumes.
Run in Illumina iSeq. iSeq (sequencer, Illumina, ILM20021532, https://www.illumina.com/systems/sequencing-platforms/iseq.html )

Setup the following reaction mix for each sample along with a no template control (NTC): A B 1 Reagent Volume (µL) 2 10X ezDNase Buffer 0.7 3 ezDNase enzyme 0.7 4 DNA/RNA 5.6 total reaction volume - 7µL per sample

Add the following to the previous reaction (Setup reaction on ice). A B 1 Reagent Volume (µL) 2 previous reaction 7 3 FastSelect Mix (1:10) 1 Total reaction volume - 8µL per sample; FastSect Mix is a mixture of QIAseq FastSelect -rRNA HMR, QIAseq FastSelect -Globin, QIAseq FastSelect -5S/16S/23S, and water, with the ratio of (QIAseq FastSelect -rRNA HMR):(QIAseq FastSelect -Globin):(QIAseq FastSelect -5S/16S/23S):water=1:1:1:7
Mix well by pipetting up and down, and briefly centrifuge.

Incubate the reaction as follows: A B 1 Temperature (°C) Time (mm:ss) 2 75 02:00 3 70 02:00 4 65 02:00 5 60 02:00 6 55 02:00 7 37 02:00 8 25 02:00 9 4 ∞ After incubation, spin down and place reaction on ice.
Incubate the reaction as follows: A B 1 Temperature (°C) Time (mm:ss) 2 37 10:00 3 4 ∞ After incubation, spin down and place reaction on ice.
Add the following to the previous reaction (Setup reaction on ice). A B 1 Reagent Volume (µL) 2 previous reaction 8 3 SuperScript IV VILO Master Mix (5X) 2 total reaction volume - 10µL per sample
Mix well by pipetting up and down, and briefly centrifuge.
Incubate the reaction as follows: A B 1 Temperature (°C) Time (mm:ss) 2 25 10:00 3 50 20:00 4 85 05:00 5 4 ∞ After incubation, spin down and place reaction on ice.

Add the following to the previous reaction (Setup reaction on ice). A B 1 Reagent Volume (µL) 2 previous reaction 10 3 water 6 4 Sequenase reaction buffer (5X) 2 5 Sequenase enzyme (1:10) 2 total reaction volume - 20µL per sample; Sequenase eznyme (1:10) is a mixture of Sequenase Dilution Buffer and Sequenase Version 2.0 DNA Polymerase, with the ratio of (Sequenase Dilution Buffer):(Sequenase Version 2.0 DNA Polymerase)=9:1.
Mix well by pipetting up and down, and briefly centrifuge.

Incubate the reaction as follows: A B 1 Temperature (°C) Time (mm:ss) 2 4 ∞ 3 37 30:00 4 95 02:00 5 4 ∞ Slow ramp (0.1°C/second) from 4°C to 37°C; After incubation, spin down and place reaction on ice.

Perform purification of the previous reaction with magnetic beads ( Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01 ). 1.25X bead reatio ( 25 µL Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01 ). Resuspend the dried bead pellet with 15 µL Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 and take 13µL for use in downstream steps (or freeze at -20C for long-term sotorage).
Combine 4 µL, Tagment DNA Buffer (TD) and 2 µL, neat ds-cDNA from previous reaction for each sample into a PCR plate or strip.
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times.
Add 2 µL, Amplicon Tagment Mix (ATM) to each well on top of the TD/DNA mix.
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times. Seal and briefly centrifuge.
Add 2 µL, Neutralize Tagment Buffer (NT) to stop the reaction.
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times. Seal and briefly centrifuge.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .
Quantify all purified DNA using Qubit™ 1X dsDNA High Sensitivity (HS) Assay Kit Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #Q33231 .
Pool the individual libraries equally in DNA amount based on the Qubit values. Here, we assume the libraries will have similar fragment lengths and distributions.
Incubate the reaction mix as follows: %s %s

Add indexes and Nextera PCR Master Mix (NPM) to the neutralised tagmentation reaction for each sample as below: A B 1 Reagent Volume (µL) 2 previous reaction 10 3 IDT® for Illumina Nextera DNA Unique Dual Indexes 4 4 Nextera PCR Master Mix (NPM) 6 total reaction volume - 20 µL per sample
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times. Seal and briefly centrifuge.

Incubate the reaction as follows: A B C 1 Temperature (°C) Time (mm:ss) cycles 2 72 03:00 1X 3 95 00:30 1X 4 95 00:10 13X 5 55 00:30 6 72 00:30 7 72 05:00 1X 8 4 ∞ After incubation, spin down and place reaction on ice.

Perform purification of the previous reaction with magnetic beads ( Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01 ). 0.8X bead reatio ( 16 µL Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01 ). Resuspend the dried bead pellet with 18 µL Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 and take 16µL for use in downstream steps (or freeze at -20C for long-term sotorage)..
Analyse 2 µL, final pool of libraries with High Sensitivity D1000 ScreenTape Agilent Technologies Catalog #5067-5584 ensuring the whole fragment peak is captured.

Scale the calculated molarity from the Tapestation to the Qubit DNA concentration using the following formula: Final molarity = (Tapestation DNA molarity) x (Qubit DNA concentration) / (Tapestation DNA concentration)
Dilute the final pooled libraries down to 1 nanomolar (nM) (at least 50μL) using Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 , and add PhiX sequencing control if required.
Combine 10 µL, 1nM libary pool and 90 µL Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 to dilute the final pool of libraries to 0.1 nanomolar (nM) for loading.
Load 20 µL, 0.1nM library pool into a defrosted Illumina iSeq cartridge with flow cell.
Quantify the final pool of libraries using Qubit™ 1X dsDNA High Sensitivity (HS) Assay Kit Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #Q33231 .
creator: Karan Kim
